intercessor_squad.notes: We model plain-line Intercessors. The Sergeant's optional weapons are deliberately omitted for v1 — tutorial scope is the basic profile, not equipment variants. Corrections 2026-07-04 vs the original scaffold: the bolt rifle is [ASSAULT, HEAVY] and the close combat weapon has 3 Attacks in the current codex profile. Profile verified 2026-07-04: 10th-codex-current baseline (Wahapedia) confirmed unchanged by the official 11th-edition Faction Pack errata (June 2026).
